mapper.select: SELECT gs.student_id AS studentId, u.real_name AS realName, s.student_no AS studentNo, s.college AS college, s.major AS major, gs.total_score AS totalScore, gs.term_year AS termYear FROM eval_growth_score gs INNER JOIN ( SELECT student_id, MAX(term_year) AS max_term FROM eval_growth_score GROUP BY student_id ) latest ON gs.student_id = latest.student_id AND gs.term_year = latest.max_term LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = gs.student_id LEFT JOIN info_student s ON s.user_id = gs.student_id ORDER BY gs.total_score DESC LIMIT 100
